message:
Add error boundary fallback UI for prompt grid

Implements user-friendly error recovery:
- PromptGridFallback component with warning icon
- Clear error message: "Something went wrong loading prompts"
- Refresh button to reload the page
- Styled with destructive theme colors

Integrates with existing ErrorBoundary component for
graceful degradation when PromptGrid fails to render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
